chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.D- 446 of 2023. Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 27.3.2025. Mr. Sajid Hussain Mahesar, advocate holding brief for Mr.Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, A.A.G assisted by Mr.Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asstt: A.G. ====== Through this petition, the Petitioner is seeking directions to Respondents No.1 to 3 (Revenue Officials) to issue Sale Certificate in respect of his land bearing Survey No.108 Deh Wakro, Tapo and Taluka Kandhkot District Kashmore @Kandhkot. Learned AAG submits that recently, the Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh, through Notification No.DD(E&I)/HQ/BOR/ 2024/302, dated 21.10.2024 has established a "Public Grievances Redressal Cell" under the aegis of the concerned Deputy Commissioner across Sindh. This cell is mandated to address public grievances pertaining to revenue matters, including mutation entries, sale certificates (subject matter of this petition), foti-khata-badal, demarcation of land, land partition, and solvency certificates. The establishment of this cell provides an alternate, effective, and exhaustive remedy for redressal of complaints related to revenue issues. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of, leaving it open for the Petitioner to avail the remedy delineated by the “Public Grievances Redressal Cell" as prescribed by the Notification. JUDGE JUDGE Shabir/P.S
